methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2026-Q2 General Manager of Digital Lending outcome goal
goals.objective: Prepare to improve Lending Product Launch Velocity for General Manager of Digital Lending by advancing rapid launch capability with servicing control through configurable lending products, partner connectivity, and automated servicing basics.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Speed at which new lending products or variants can be launched and iterated.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Margin created by the lending portfolio after servicing and collections costs.

keyResults.statement: Increase Lending Product Launch Velocity during the quarter.

goals.title: 2026-Q2 VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS outcome goal
goals.objective: Prepare to improve Partner Go-Live Time for VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS by advancing partner launch repeatability through tenant setup, public apis, and operational controls that reduce time-to-live for new programs.
